productName: Tasty Terps - TT BHO 1g - Strawberry Cheesecake - 1g
description: A potent indica butane hash oil from Strawberry Cheesecake, extracted in a sealed closed-loop system by licensed techs and carefully purged to lab-tested purity. Potent, clean, and lab-tested — with notes of cheese, strawberry, and butter, with deep, easygoing relaxation.
